Alle Klassen und Schnittstellen|Alle Packages|Konstantenfeldwerte|Serialisierte Form

G

Game - Klasse in model
Represents the complete game state.
Game(Dungeon, Player, Map<String, Item>, Enemy[]) - Konstruktor für Klasse model.Game
Creates a new game instance with the given components.
GAME - Statische Variable in Klasse view.GameFrame
Identifier for the main gameplay screen.
GameController - Klasse in controller
Utility controller class responsible for creating, loading, and managing Game instances.
GameFrame - Klasse in view
Main application window of the game.
GameFrame() - Konstruktor für Klasse view.GameFrame
Creates the main game frame and initializes all UI components.
GameWindow - Klasse in view.gamewindow
Main in-game UI container responsible for rendering the dungeon view, player HUD (health bar), and handling real-time player input.
GameWindow(GameFrame, Game) - Konstruktor für Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Creates the main gameplay window.
getAmount(Item) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Returns the quantity of a specific item in the inventory.
getBorderInsets(Component) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.RoundedCornerBorder
Returns the default border insets for this rounded border.
getBorderInsets(Component, Insets) - Methode in Klasse view.utils.RoundedCornerBorder
Updates and returns the provided Insets object with the border insets.
getButtons() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.BattleMenuPanel
Returns all action buttons of the battle menu.
getButtons() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.BattleView
Returns the action buttons displayed in the battle menu.
getConsumables(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns all consumable items currently stored in the player's inventory.
getCurrentDungeonImage() - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.DungeonPanel
Returns the currently rendered dungeon image.
getDamage() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Calculates the player's total attack damage based on equipped weapons.
getDamage() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Weapon
Returns the damage value of this weapon.
getDamage(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's current damage value.
getDefense() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Enemy
Returns the defense value of this enemy.
getDefense() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Calculates the player's total defense based on equipped armor pieces.
getDefense() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Accessory
Returns the defense value of this accessory.
getDefense() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Armor
Returns the defense value of this armor.
getDefense() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Headwear
Returns the defense value of this headwear.
getDefense(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's current defense value.
getDescription() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Returns the description of the item.
getDescription(Item) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.ItemController
Returns the description of the specified item.
getDirFlee() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the opposite direction of the last movement direction.
getDungeon() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the dungeon the player is currently in.
getDungeon(Game) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.GameController
Returns the game's dungeon.
getDungeonPanel() - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Returns the panel responsible for rendering the dungeon.
getEnemies() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.BattleView
Returns the enemy panels displayed in the current battle.
getEnemies() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.EnemiesViewPanel
Returns a list of all active EnemyPanel instances in this view.
getEnemies(Game) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.GameController
Returns all enemies available in the game.
getEnemiesForBattle(Enemy[]) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EncounterSystem
Creates a random group of enemies for a battle encounter.
getEnemy() - Methode in Klasse view.battle.EnemyPanel
Returns the enemy associated with this panel.
getEquipment(Player, EquipmentSlot) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the item equipped in the specified equipment slot.
getEquipment(EquipmentSlot) - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the currently equipped item in the specified slot.
getEquipments(Player, Itemtype) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns all equipment items of the specified item type that are available in the player's inventory.
getEquipments(Itemtype) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Returns all items of a specific type.
getExit(Direction) - Methode in Klasse model.dungeon.Room
Returns the exit in the specified direction.
getFacing() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the direction the player is currently facing.
getFacing(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the direction the player is currently facing.
getGender() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the player's gender.
getHealth() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Returns the current health of this entity.
getHealth(Enemy) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EnemyController
Returns the current health value of the specified enemy.
getHealth(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's current health.
getHealthBar() - Methode in Klasse view.gamewindow.GameWindow
Returns the player's health bar.
getImagename() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Enemy
Returns the image name of this enemy.
getImagename() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Returns the image name associated with the item.
getImagepath(Enemy) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EnemyController
Returns the relative file path to the image representing the specified enemy.
getImagepath(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the file path of the player's sprite image.
getImagePath(Item) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.ItemController
Returns the relative image path for the specified item.
getInventory() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the player's inventory.
getInventory(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns all inventory entries including their quantities.
getItem(String) - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Finds an item entry by its name (case-insensitive).
getItemFromInventory(Player, String) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the inventory entry for the specified item name.
getItems() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Inventory
Returns the internal map of items and their quantities.
getMaxHealth() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Returns the maximum health of this entity.
getMaxHealth(Enemy) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.EnemyController
Returns the maximum health value of the specified enemy.
getMaxHealth(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's maximum health.
getMusicPlayer() - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Returns the music player used to manage the game's background music and audio playback.
getName() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Entity
Returns the name of this entity.
getName() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Returns the name of the item.
getName(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's name.
getName(Item) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.ItemController
Returns the display name of the specified item.
getPauseMenuBar() - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Returns the pause menu bar.
getPlayer(Game) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.GameController
Returns the current player.
getSlot() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Accessory
Returns the equipment slot this accessory belongs to.
getSlot() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Armor
Returns the equipment slot this armor belongs to.
getSlot() - Methode in Schnittstelle model.items.equipments.Equippable
Returns the equipment slot associated with this item.
getSlot() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Headwear
Returns the equipment slot this headwear belongs to.
getSlot() - Methode in Klasse model.items.equipments.Weapon
Returns the equipment slot this weapon belongs to.
getStat(Item) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.ItemController
Returns the primary combat statistic of the specified item.
getType() - Methode in Klasse model.items.Item
Returns the type of the item.
getWindow() - Methode in Klasse view.GameFrame
Returns the active game window.
getX() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the player's x-coordinate in the dungeon.
getX(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's current x-coordinate.
getXLength(Dungeon) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.DungeonController
Returns the number of rooms along the x-axis of the dungeon.
getY() - Methode in Klasse model.entity.Player
Returns the player's y-coordinate in the dungeon.
getY(Player) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.PlayerController
Returns the player's current y-coordinate.
getYLength(Dungeon) - Statische Methode in Klasse controller.DungeonController
Returns the number of rooms along the y-axis of the dungeon.
